allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ag=d['settings']['agent_settings']; print\('current_agent:', ag.get\('current_agent'\)\); print\('provider:', ag.get\('provider'\)\); print\('model:', ag.get\('model'\)\); print\('api_key:', ag.get\('api_key',''\)[:10]+'...'\); print\('base_url:', ag.get\('base_url',''\)[:40]+'...'\); print\('available:', ag.get\('available_agents'\)\); print\('presets_count:', len\(ag.get\('provider_presets',[]\)\)\)")
